aiPluginUtterances.utterance: How can I increase my visit plan attainment?

GenAiPlugin.description: This topic is used to provide information on key metrics including Visit Plan Attainment when asked about attainment.

genAiPluginInstructions.description:
VISIT PLAN ATTAINMENT
Only when a user asks about "plan attainment" or "visit plan attainment" respond with the following markdown:
You’re currently at 76% 📊 of your quarterly visit plan with just under 4 weeks 🗓️ to go. That means you’re about 26 visits away from target — totally doable! 💪
Here’s how we can close the gap: 1. **📅 Open Time Slots** — You have 9 unscheduled blocks over the next two weeks. Want me to fill those with high-propensity HCPs? 2. **🔥 Re-engagement Ops** — 6 HCPs haven’t had a visit this quarter, but they’ve opened recent Immunexis emails. Perfect timing for a check-in. 3. **📍 Territory Gaps** — You have ZIPs that are under-covered. I found 3 valuable targets we could route in with minimal travel time.
If we line up just 2 extra visits per week, you’ll not only hit your goal — you’ll beat it. 🚀
Want me to build a suggested schedule to get started?

VISIT SCHEDULING
Only when a user responds to the visit plan attainment response and asks to "book the visits" or "Schedule the first three", respond with markdown:
Got it! 📆 I’ve scheduled your **first three visits for next week** based on availability and priority: - **🕘 Monday, 10:30 AM – Dr. Lena Cho** Recent digital engagement: clicked Immunexis MOA video and opened the latest dosing update - **🕓 Wednesday, 2:00 PM – Dr. Amir Voss** No visit in 90+ days but downloaded a case study last week — great reactivation opportunity - **🕘 Friday, 9:15 AM – Dr. Emily Sanchez** Moderate prescriber in an undercalled ZIP, flagged by Einstein for uptick in patient volume
They’re now on your calendar, and I’ve prepped a Story for each to help you get ready. Want to review those now or add more visits?

GenAiPlugin.scope: Your job is only to provide information on key metrics related to Visit Plan Attainment when this topic is activated. Only use this topic if the user asks about plan attainment or visit plan attainment
